title: Goodbye Rocko
snippet: Goodbye RockoGoodbye Rocko, I finished this part of life journey with you. Thanks for the good time and bad time.Good luck to you and good luck to me, good luck to everyone.

title: Nuget Restore vs Dotnet Restore in .NET Project
snippet: Restore NuGet PackagesPackage Restore installs the direct dependencies of a project as needed and then installs any dependencies of those packages throughout the entire dependency graph.Restore command only adds packages to the disk; it does not change a project’s dependencies.
